data.title: Taiwan Fund, Inc. reports Q1 earnings with net asset value per share of $67.52 as of Nov 30, 2025.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the Taiwan Fund, Inc. revealed its investment performance for the quarter ending November 30, 2025. The Fund, listed on NYSE as TWN, reported a net asset value per share of $67.52 at the close of business.

data.title: Delia Osegueda named Vice President of Global Partnerships at AIC Hotel Group, leading portfolio with brands like Nobu and Hard Rock.
data.description: In Miami on January 14, 2026, Delia Osegueda was appointed as the Vice President of Global Partnerships at AIC Hotel Group. With a portfolio covering various renowned hotel brands such as Nobu Hotels, Hard Rock Hotels, and AVA Resort and Spa, AIC Hotel Group is a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Z.AI unveils GLM-Image, first AI model trained without US chips. Beijing aims for self-reliance with Huawei hardware.
data.description: Z.AI recently launched GLM-Image, which was exclusively trained using Huawei chips. This development comes amidst Beijing's efforts to restrict the import of Nvidia H200 in order to promote self-sufficiency in artificial intelligence. The move highlights China's emphasis on domestic production and innovation in the AI sector.

data.title: Cineverse and GameStop partner for "Return to Silent Hill" movie, offering exclusive rewards and messages. Movie hits theaters January 23.
data.description: The highly anticipated release of "Return to Silent Hill" will be hitting theaters across the nation on January 23, 2026. Cineverse (Nasdaq: CNVS), an innovative entertainment studio, and GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) are teaming up for this big premiere. Fans of the iconic horror franchise can secure their tickets now for this cinematic event.

data.title: Digital agency Bottle Rocket appoints Matt Smith as President, effective immediately.
data.description: In Dallas on January 14, 2026, Bottle Rocket, an influential digital product agency within the global WPP network, revealed that Matt Smith has been named President. This appointment is effective immediately. Matt, recognized for his adept leadership skills and track record in fostering robust client connections, will now assume the role of President.

data.title: NVAR and KCM partnership offers video solution & tools for members on Jan. 14, 2026. Elevate business growth!
data.description: NVAR has announced a new partnership with Keeping Current Matters (KCM) that offers its members a comprehensive video solution along with special discounts on KCM's market insight tools. This collaboration, revealed on January 14, 2026, in Fairfax, Virginia, is set to provide NVAR members with exclusive benefits from KCM.

data.title: Bestselling authors Mark Harmon and Leon Carroll, Jr. to release third installment, Ghosts of Sicily, on April 14, 2026.
data.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn.--Harper Select is set to release the latest book, “Ghosts of Sicily: The True Story of the Naval Intelligence Agents Who Courted the Mob to Fight Nazis in America and the Battlefields of Italy,” by Mark Harmon and Leon Carroll, Jr. The book follows the success of their previous works, Ghosts of Honolulu and Ghosts of Panama. Scheduled for publication on April 14, 2026, this installment delves into the events of 1942 in New York City during wartime. The narrative explores the collaboration between Naval Intelligence agents and the Mafia to combat the Nazis in the U.S. and Italy. The story unfolds against the backdrop of German U-boats targeting ships near the coast and heightened tensions in Washington, DC.
Spain tells citizens to leave protest-hit Iran

data.title: Final horizontal arm of Sagrada Familia's cross installed, with 17-meter-tall cross bringing total height to 172 meters.
data.description: The last component yet to be added is the upper arm of the cross, featuring Agnus Dei, a sculpture crafted by Italian artist Andrea Mastrovito. Upon completion, this arm will top off the Tower of Jesus Christ, boosting the Sagrada Família's ultimate height to 172 meters. This final installation will wrap up the construction of the magnificent monument.

data.title: TRM Equity sells majority stake of Wellman Dynamics to J.F. Lehman & Co. in 2026.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, a private equity firm called TRM Equity II announced the successful sale of a majority stake in Wellman Dynamics to J.F. Lehman & Company. TRM specializes in control investments in special situations within the lower middle market. The exact financial details of the transaction were not disclosed to the public.

data.title: Bitcoin peaks at $97,500 with 2% rise in Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin; 149,828 traders liquidated for $848.51 million.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged to $97,500 briefly on Wednesday due to increased positive market sentiment, leading to a rise in liquidations and heightened demand for ETFs. The current prices for cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $97,561.89, Ethereum at $3,387.58, Solana at $147.07, XRP at $2.15, Dogecoin at $0.1488, and Shiba Inu at $0.058829. In the last 24 hours, 149,828 traders were liquidated, resulting in a total of $848.51 million in losses. Among the top gainers in the past day are Dash, Internet Computer, and Monero. Notable news includes developments involving the crypto custodian company BitGo. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
